The '''Kro'eval system''' was a star system, which lay on the edge of Separatist space during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It contained at least two habitable planets, [[Kromus]] and [[Kromol]], in the fourth and fifth orbits around the system.

During the Clone Wars, it was the site of the [[Battle of Kromus/Legends|Battle of Kromus]].

{{System-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
During the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|''Living Force'']] storyline, the information on the system's fourth and fifth planets in [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] records is swapped around, but is not entirely clear whether this includes the actual names of Kromus and Kromol.
